message:
fix(worker): probe disk space from project root instead of /tmp

/tmp may be a small tmpfs on some workers, producing false disk
pressure signals. Prefer DEFAULT_CANONICAL_PROJECT_ROOT and
DEFAULT_ALIAS_PROJECT_ROOT before falling back to /tmp.

Extracts probe_disk_space_for(path) helper and iterates candidates
with find_map so the first existing, queryable mount wins.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
